question: Extend the `Date` class (from Q13) to overload the `<<` operator (insertion operator) so that `Date` objects can be easily printed to `std::cout` in a 'DD-MM-YYYY' format.

test_cases.input: Date d2(15, 10, 2024); std::cout << "Another Date: " << d2 << std::endl;
Date d3(5, 3, 2021); std::cout << "Third Date: " << d3 << std::endl;
